programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: From tangled brush to pitch-black streets, these K9s sniff out danger with precision; after a tense pursuit, K9 Eddie corners a suspect hiding deep in a ravine; across the country, K9 Streeter makes a heart-stopping leap; K9 Riggs corners a double murder suspect; K9 Diesel kicks off his late-night shift by chasing down a hit-and-run perp.

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi

programme.title: K9 PD With Jim Belushi

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael prepares gnocchi from scratch, cooking them in butter and sage, and pairs it with a juicy roast tenderloin served alongside sautéed greens; John crafts a classic martini infused with bergamot liqueur for a citrusy twist.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael creates a hearty ragù sauce using sautéed vegetables and locally-sourced Cinghiale meat, pairing it with Pici, a Tuscan pasta similar to a thicker spaghetti.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Justin believes a house situated on a corner will be easy to flip, until he learns that fast-moving vehicles often crash into the home's backyard.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Ashlee convinces the team to let her take creative control of a flip, but arguments over design choices spark a showdown that slows the remodel and drives up the project's budget.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team is racing against the clock to ensure two Zombies are ready for school; the homes are in trendy neighborhoods, but will that be enough to make a passing grade?

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Family Business
programme.desc: Tommy Harr takes on a high-risk, high-reward project, picking up a cramped 1970s ranch with a crumbling foundation. The purchase price is low but turning around the dated and dangerous house will take a huge investment and help from the entire family. The margins are tight on this flip, and tensions rise as Tommy and his mom Katie, designer and real estate agent, clash over the budget for high-end

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: Seattle flipping pro James Dainard has built his reputation rescuing zombie houses other investors won't touch; when ambitious flipper Amanda brings him a unique potential partnership, he's intrigued: a crumbling mid-century modern designed by renowned architect Wendell Lovett that most investors would tear down; however, James sees a rare chance to restore an architectural gem.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: The team head to Conroe, Texas, to help a grieving family reclaim their late grandmother's home from a squatter couple who moved in after her passing; tensions run high when the couple resists leaving.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: A young couple in Philadelphia lists their home for sale, only to find a squatter already living in it; when confronted by Flash's team, he is completely shocked and produces a fraudulent lease; but can Flash see through the scam and help the homeowners take back what's rightfully theirs?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In New York, Maria turns part of her home into an apartment for her grandson-but everything unravels when a negligent tenant living under the same roof as her, refuses to vacate; after barricading the door and cutting off access to her own space, Flash and his team face the escalating battle.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ray is ready to move back home-until he discovers an intruder linked to his previous tenant has taken over his house; when Flash and his team step inside, it's anything but a routine squatter removal job; the house is uninhabitable, and the danger runs far deeper than expected.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash Shelton and his team head to Vancouver, Washington to help a homeowner after a house sitter overstays her welcome and becomes an unwanted squatter; when Flash's team attempts to reclaim the home by using surveillance cameras, megaphones and even snakes, the confrontation turns into a tense standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Garland, Texas, Flash Shelton and his team help a family repossess their deceased brother's home from a squatter who moved in on the day that their brother died.
